schemaNote: No knowledge-graph-schema.md existed in strategy/ at curation time. Field set and edge types below were defined per the task brief and documented in README.md.

nodes.name: OpenAI and AI SDK Chatbot
nodes.author: shadcn
nodes.designSignals: Clean reference implementation by shadcn himself — minimal chrome, message bubbles built directly from shadcn/ui primitives.
nodes.ratingSignal: 10.2K duplicates / 91 likes (v0.app official AI gallery)
upgradeVectors: Upgrade to AI SDK 5 UIMessage streaming parts
Add multi-provider routing via Vercel AI Gateway
Add tool-calling UI for function results

nodes.name: Image Generation Playground
nodes.author: estebansuarez
nodes.designSignals: Playground-style split panel (prompt controls left, generated gallery right) with generous negative space.
nodes.ratingSignal: 6.3K duplicates / 697 likes (v0.app official AI gallery)
upgradeVectors: Swap in Nano Banana Pro / gpt-image-2 via AI Gateway
Add generation queue + job status polling
Add rights/usage metadata per generated asset

nodes.name: AI Agent Builder
nodes.author: mleiter
nodes.designSignals: Node/flow-style builder canvas implying visual agent composition.
nodes.ratingSignal: 1K duplicates / 341 likes (v0.app official AI gallery)
upgradeVectors: Wire to a real agent runtime (LangGraph/Mastra) instead of a static canvas
Add an eval/test-run harness per agent

nodes.name: v0 Agent Builder
nodes.author: estebansuarez
nodes.designSignals: Meta template — uses v0's own Platform API as the agent substrate, clean dev-tool aesthetic.
nodes.ratingSignal: 245 duplicates / 78 likes (v0.app official Agents gallery)

nodes.ratingSignal: 370 duplicates / 167 likes (v0.app official Agents gallery)
